sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109128" key="u(poskafio/kartos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσκᾰφῐόκαρτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κείρω</etym>) of hair, <sense id="n109128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut somewhat in the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκάφιον</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fashion</tr_> (v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκάφιον</foreign> (A) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.</author> </bibl> Com.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2037.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
